ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "video_title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "video_description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the video was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the video */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the video has received */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the video has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the video has received */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video category */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the video thumbnail */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date and time the video was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user registered */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was published */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies the comment has received */,
  "parent_comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent comment (if this is a reply) */,
  "hate_speech_label" TEXT /* Label indicating whether the comment is hate speech */,
  "hate_speech_score" REAL /* Score indicating the likelihood of the comment being hate speech */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been edited */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the comment the reply is to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the reply */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was published */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the reply has received */,
  "hate_speech_label" TEXT /* Label indicating whether the reply is hate speech */,
  "hate_speech_score" REAL /* Score indicating the likelihood of the reply being hate speech */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Whether the reply has been edited */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "like_history" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the content */,
  "comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the comment liked (if applicable) */,
  "reply_id" TEXT /* ID of the reply liked (if applicable) */,
  "liked_at" TEXT /* Date and time the like was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hate_speech_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hate speech label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the hate speech label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hate speech label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was moderated */,
  "comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the comment the action was on (if applicable) */,
  "reply_id" TEXT /* ID of the reply the action was on (if applicable) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., delete, hide, report) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was taken */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the action */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the video category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_category_association" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_bans" (
  "ban_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ban */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was banned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the ban */,
  "ban_date" TEXT /* Date and time the ban was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date and time the ban expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ban_id")
)
